hero.learnMore: Learn more about Apex Pro Talent Services

whyChooseUs.title: Why Apex Pro Talent Services
whyChooseUs.findWorkFastDesc: We receive new job openings every single day, from companies in transportation, logistics, engineering and financial services—and more! Find work fast by browsing our job openings and connecting with a recruiter.
whyChooseUs.peopleFirstDesc: Advance your career with online training courses, e-learning programs and personalized career guidance. When you're an active associate, you'll qualify for it all!
whyChooseUs.diversityInclusionDesc: Work with us to help improve accessibility and opportunity within your local area. We develop and support programs that upskill underrepresented populations for meaningful and sustainable work.

ctaBanner.title: Create a profile and we'll guide you to your next job
ctaBanner.description: In addition to excellent job opportunities, your account also gives you access to upskilling courses, workshops, and skills assessments. Whether you're looking for a new job or trying to figure out what kind of work best suits your talents, we'll help you get ahead.

engineering.subtitle: Skilled Trades
engineering.title: Apex Pro Skilled Trades
engineering.description: From construction and manufacturing to IT and beyond, there is a wide range of opportunities within skilled trades. For employers, this means having a clear understanding of the skills candidates need to possess to fill your open positions. We connect you with top talent across all industries.

thoughtLeadership.label: Thought Leadership
thoughtLeadership.title: The Q1 Employment Outlook Survey results are in!
thoughtLeadership.description: Our latest report reveals that 36% of hiring managers plan to add staff in Q1 2026. Dive into our comprehensive report for detailed insights into job hotspots, industry profiles and workforce trends.

insights.title: Insights
insights.article1: Putting Industrial Robots on the Payroll
insights.article2: Navigating Talent Shortages: The Importance of Soft Skills
insights.article3: Using Data Analytics to Drive Continuous Improvement in Manufacturing

footer.readyDesc: Whether you're looking for work or talent, we're here 24/7.
footer.tagline: Connecting reliable talent with meaningful opportunities 24/7. Your success is our priority.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Apex Pro Talent Services. All rights reserved.

about.heroDesc: A proudly Canadian employment agency committed to delivering dependable workforce solutions across all industries—24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
about.missionDesc: At Apex Pro Talent Services, our mission is to connect reliable talent with meaningful opportunities 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. As a proudly Canadian employment agency, we are committed to delivering dependable workforce solutions across all industries—ensuring our clients have the right people, at the right time, every time. We handle the manpower and the paperwork so our clients can focus on growing and running their business with confidence.
about.visionDesc: Our vision is to become a trusted national leader in employment and workforce solutions across Canada, recognized for our strong Canadian values, integrity, and round-the-clock service. We strive to build long-term partnerships with businesses while creating stable, rewarding opportunities for workers in construction, labour, skilled trades, agriculture, hospitality, manufacturing, IT, and beyond. Through dedication and reliability, we aim to strengthen Canadian industries by supporting the people who keep them moving.
about.lookingForJobDesc: Whether you're looking for a temporary role or a permanent position, we offer a wide range of job listings so you can find the job that perfectly meets your preferences. Send your resume to
about.lookingForJobDesc2: and we'll help you find the right fit.
about.optimizeDesc: Our staffing solutions ensure optimal job matches while fostering employee productivity, growth, and alignment with your company objectives. Contact our sales team at
about.searchingDesc: In the diverse talent landscape, pinpointing the ideal candidate can be a challenge. With Apex Pro Talent Services, it becomes a seamless endeavor. Whether a local business or a nationwide enterprise, rely on us to optimize your recruitment success—24/7.
about.insightsCardDesc: We're committed to workforce development with comprehensive programs that empower workers to develop essential skills across construction, manufacturing, IT, and more.

jobSeekers.heroTitle: Find your new job through us!
jobSeekers.heroDesc: Looking to take the next step on your career ladder? Chances are you'll find an appealing, suitable job close to home in our job listings – full-time, part-time, temporary, permanent, you name it.
jobSeekers.myPathDesc: MyPath is our global development program, focused on supporting and developing careers through the personalized advice and training we offer our employees. With MyPath, we provide a sustainable solution to the talent shortage employers face.
jobSeekers.careerSuccessDesc: You will find your way to work with us. Read more about the benefits of working for us, skills training programs offered, the types of jobs we offer and what you can expect.
jobSeekers.skillsTrainingDesc: Associates are offered skills training via programs such as MyPath and powerYOU that offers a variety of course selections.
jobSeekers.medalsDesc: As an Associate, you can earn medals that appear in your profile and are a testament to your success at work!
jobSeekers.talentAgent: Working with your Dedicated Talent Agent
jobSeekers.talentAgentDesc: Our Talent Agents and Recruiters hold local market expertise and are dedicated to using that knowledge to guide, support and connect you to jobs.
jobSeekers.ctaTitle: Create a profile. We'll help you find your next job.
jobSeekers.ctaDesc: When you're looking for a new job, it's important to find a position that suits your skills and traits – and how you want to work.
jobSeekers.insight1: Handling with Care: Safety Tips for a Forklift Operator
jobSeekers.insight2: Tips for Writing an Effective Resume and Cover Letter
jobSeekers.insight3: Behind Every Great Office: The Role of Administrative Assistants
jobSeekers.alertsTitle: You can get job alerts straight to your inbox!
jobSeekers.alertsDesc: When you create a profile, you can set up alerts about jobs you are interested in right on your dashboard!

employers.heroDesc: Gain rapid access to a highly qualified and productive pool of candidates. We optimize your workforce with staffing and solutions tailored to your needs.
employers.valuePropTitle: A winning workforce is humanly possible.
employers.valuePropDesc: We optimize your workforce with staffing and solutions. Our Recruiters have built strong relationships with the talent in your community and take great care to match the right person to the right job. Our workforce solutions ensure your employees are doing their job and doing it well as they see a path and direction for growth alongside you.
employers.mfgDesc: The Right Fit at the Right Time. Our expert manufacturing solutions leverage the full potential of your organization's workforce by designing solutions specifically for your organization's requirements.
employers.step1Desc: What workforce challenges give you heartburn? What are your KPIs? What's your culture like? Our years of experience means we know the right questions to ask.
employers.step2Desc: Using what we learned, we recommend the best course of action to help you achieve your goals through intelligent data and processes.
employers.step3Desc: We deliver results by attracting better talent, hiring the right people, and making sure the best people stay with your organization.
employers.step4Desc: We are always learning, looking for ways to get better. We perform ongoing Workforce Reviews to fine-tune our approach.
employers.staffingDesc: Ready to start hiring the right candidates? Whether you need one outstanding worker or 100, we're ready to deliver. Direct hire, project staffing, flexibility staffing and onsite management — We have all the resources and tools you need.
employers.myPathDesc: We provide skill building programs so your team members can grow their skills and gain certifications while working. Invest in your workforce's future.
employers.insight1: Enhance Workforce Planning with MPact Advantage
employers.insight2: Putting Industrial Robots on the Payroll
employers.insight3: 8 Steps to Building Your Own Skilled Technical Workforce
employers.connectDesc: Tell us what your business needs are. We will create value together with you.

blog.label: Insights
blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Our Blog provides both employers and job seekers with expertise, guidance, surveys and reports on today's most relevant topics, such as job reports, talent management, workforce strategies, as well as articles about how to navigate finding and landing a job.
blog.noArticles: No articles found matching your filters.

contact.heroDesc: Whether you are a candidate or a current associate, a current client or prospective client, you can use this form to ask questions or to report an issue. We've always got you covered.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We are here to help. Whether you are looking for work, are already working with us, or would like to find out more about working with us. A Representative in your area will be in touch within 24 hours.
contact.subject: Subject *
contact.messagePlaceholder: Please describe how we can help you...
contact.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. A representative will be in touch within 24 hours.

jobSearch.title: Search Jobs
jobSearch.subtitle: Find your next opportunity from hundreds of positions
jobSearch.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for?
jobSearch.cantFindDesc: Create a profile and let us find the perfect job for you. Get personalized job alerts delivered to your inbox.
